events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! From stadium-filling riffs to astronomical insights, he truly is a rock legend.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Enduring Icon
angles.copy: Still strutting and rocking at 83! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with that iconic first video. The irony isn't lost on us, but what a moment for music and pop culture!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your top track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll,' passed away on August 16, 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. It's 49 years since we lost Elvis Presley, but his music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur tragically passed away on September 13, 1996, following a shooting in Las Vegas; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, whose powerful voice and lyrics continue to resonate 30 years after his passing. A true hip-hop icon.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, passed away on September 18, 1970; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix today, 56 years since we lost a true guitar visionary. His influence on music is immeasurable.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road,' on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The one with THAT cover. 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' – an album as iconic as the zebra crossing itself.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll rebel with a voice that still captivates.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Star Persona
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite track from the legendary frontman?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on September 9, 1971.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A powerful message that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember when this changed everything? 25 years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod, putting a thousand songs in your pocket.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No,' in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, what's your favourite thing about 007?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedic genius.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album,' on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'The White Album'. An incredibly diverse and experimental record. What's your standout track?
